Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Teach_at_the_SBDC.asp

# Become an SBDC Trainer Process

## Resource summary
The Become a Trainer page is for experienced professionals interested in leading business webinars and training events. It asks for name, business, title, contact information, topic, preferred format, target audience, comments, and how the person heard about SBDC.

## BOSS routing use
Use this when the entrepreneur wants education, classes, webinars, or event-based learning. If the issue is urgent or specific to the business, pair training with SBDC advising.

## Dynamic-content warning
Class dates and webinar titles change. Provide the official link and instruct the user to filter by location/topic/format rather than relying on stale dates.
